list.name: API Layer
list.description: FastAPI entry point exposing REST endpoints for clinical querying, ingestion, listing, deletion.

list.name: RAG Pipeline
list.description: Core RAG modules: orchestrator, retriever, intent parser, query router, LLM client, deprecated stubs.

list.name: Data Layer
list.description: PostgreSQL schema/CRUD, ChromaDB vector store, ingestion pipeline, ICD-9 lookup, SQL retriever, migration scripts, fixture data.

list.name: Service & Admin Layer
list.description: HIPAA audit logger and CLI catalog-admin tool.

list.name: Frontend Layer
list.description: Streamlit chat UI, its Dockerfile, and dependency manifest.

list.name: Infrastructure Layer
list.description: Docker Compose and container build definitions for the 4-service stack.

list.name: Configuration Layer
list.description: Pydantic Settings module, .env.example template, tooling config.

file:backend/config.py.name: config.py
file:backend/config.py.summary: Central configuration module defining a Pydantic Settings class for all runtime parameters.

file:backend/main.py.name: main.py
file:backend/main.py.summary: FastAPI application entry point exposing REST endpoints for ingestion, querying, listing, and deletion.

file:backend/rag/orchestrator.py.name: orchestrator.py
file:backend/rag/orchestrator.py.summary: Top-level RAG query orchestrator routing queries to vector or SQL retriever with audit logging.

file:backend/rag/retriever.py.name: retriever.py
file:backend/rag/retriever.py.summary: Full hybrid retrieval pipeline: intent parsing, routing, SQL/vector dispatching, cross-encoder reranking, hallucination grading.

file:backend/rag/intent_parser.py.name: intent_parser.py
file:backend/rag/intent_parser.py.summary: Regex-based parser extracting patient names, providers, dates, ICD codes from plain-English clinical queries.

file:backend/rag/query_router.py.name: query_router.py
file:backend/rag/query_router.py.summary: Classifies parsed intent as analytical/SQL-lookup/ICD-10/vector-search and attaches routing metadata.

file:backend/rag/llm_client.py.name: llm_client.py
file:backend/rag/llm_client.py.summary: Unified LLM invocation dispatching to Ollama or OpenAI based on configuration.

file:backend/rag/sql_retriever.py.name: sql_retriever.py
file:backend/rag/sql_retriever.py.summary: SQL retrieval: structured entity lookup and LLM text-to-SQL analytical query path.

file:backend/rag/vectorstore.py.name: vectorstore.py
file:backend/rag/vectorstore.py.summary: ChromaDB vector collection with hybrid BM25+dense search and CRUD operations.

file:backend/rag/ingestion.py.name: ingestion.py
file:backend/rag/ingestion.py.summary: Core ingestion pipeline processing tabular (CSV/Excel) and unstructured (PDF/TXT/DOCX) files into PostgreSQL and ChromaDB.

file:backend/rag/audit_logger.py.name: audit_logger.py
file:backend/rag/audit_logger.py.summary: HIPAA-oriented audit logging writing structured JSON records of every query event to a rotating log file.

file:backend/rag/icd9_lookup.py.name: icd9_lookup.py
file:backend/rag/icd9_lookup.py.summary: Lazy-loaded in-memory ICD-9 diagnosis code lookup table.

file:backend/db/schema.py.name: schema.py
file:backend/db/schema.py.summary: PostgreSQL schema initialization, connection management, migration runner, and dynamic staging-table/view system.

file:backend/db/operations.py.name: operations.py
file:backend/db/operations.py.summary: PostgreSQL data-access: upsert and fuzzy-match for patients, providers, admissions, clinical records.

file:backend/scripts/catalog_admin.py.name: catalog_admin.py
file:backend/scripts/catalog_admin.py.summary: CLI tool for managing the data stream catalog that drives the dynamic SQL query layer.

file:backend/scripts/migrate_sqlite_to_p.name: migrate_sqlite_to_postgres.py
file:backend/scripts/migrate_sqlite_to_p.summary: Database migration from SQLite to PostgreSQL.

file:backend/scripts/purge_structured_ch.name: purge_structured_chroma.py
file:backend/scripts/purge_structured_ch.summary: Maintenance script for purging structured documents from ChromaDB.

file:frontend/app.py.name: app.py
file:frontend/app.py.summary: Streamlit chat interface for querying patient records and billing in plain English.

file:scripts/purge_structured_chroma.py.name: purge_structured_chroma.py
file:scripts/purge_structured_chroma.py.summary: Top-level copy of ChromaDB purge script.
